value.title: The AI Arms Race Isn’t About Technology – It’s About Electricity
value.summary: The bottleneck has shifted from chips to power, and one under-the-radar stock just signed a 15-year, $2.6 billion AI lease that proves the trade is real. The market hasn’t priced it yet.

value.title: Micron Must Do This on June 24, or Its Stock Could Crash
value.summary: The AI boom has created a market where good results are no longer good enough. Investors have rewarded companies tied to artificial intelligence with premium valuations, but they have also become far less forgiving. A strong quarter can still lead to a falling stock price if management fails to convince Wall Street that growth is ... Micron Must Do This on June 24, or Its Stock Could Crash

value.title: Wall Street Technician Declares Financials, Industrials, and Biotech Poised for Breakouts. 3 ETFs Could Soar.
value.summary: Markets are hunting for new leadership as the Big Tech engine sputters, and one Wall Street technician thinks she knows where the baton is being passed. On CNBC’s Closing Bell Overtime, Fairlead Strategies founder Katie Stockton argued that financials, industrials, and biotech look ready to take over leadership as semiconductor and memory names show their ... Wall Street Technician Declares Financials, Industrials, and Biotech Poised for Breakouts. 3 ETFs Could Soar.
